title: CH65 4HB, Essar Oil (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/FP3139FN/V015
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Essar Oil (UK) Limited Installation name: Stanlow Manufacturing Complex Permit number: EPR/FP3139FN/V015  "
